video:video.video:title: Detect Log4j and Other Vulnerabilities in Minutes with NetRise
video:video.video:description: Discover critical vulnerabilities like Log4j in minutes, not months. This video demonstrates how NetRise automates security analysis to instantly identify exposure across your entire asset inventory. Learn how to bypass the manual process of querying vendors and gain immediate visibility into zero-day risks. Watch now to see how you can mitigate threats faster and secure your devices with NetRise.
